name: Korean Air

carryOn.notes: Economy: 1 bag up to 10 kg. Prestige/First: 2 bags up to 18 kg total.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: How many bags can I check on Korean Air?
faqs.answer: Economy: 1 bag (23 kg). Prestige (Business): 2 bags (32 kg each). First: 3 bags (32 kg each) on international flights.
